hero.title: Manage tasks,
hero.subtitle: A clean Kanban board to organize your workflow. Create columns, add tasks, set priorities and deadlines.

organize.title: Organize your tasks
organize.desc: Drag and drop tasks between columns to track your progress effortlessly.

theme.title: Customize your workspace
theme.desc: Pick from 6 background presets to create the perfect atmosphere for deep work.

deadline.title: Set deadlines
deadline.desc: Assign due dates and priority marks to keep every task on schedule.

columns.title: Manage your columns
columns.desc: Create, rename, recolor, and delete columns to fit your workflow.
